items.title: Jalen Hurts on Sean Mannion: You can definitely see the vision for the Eagles' offense
items.summary: "It's been a really good process so far,” Hurts said of learning the Eagles' new offensive system.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: From non-league to Champions League - Raya's fairytale rise
items.summary: Twelve years ago Arsenal keeper David Raya made his debut for non-league Southport; on Saturday he plays in the Champions League final - this is how he got there.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rafa review – Netflix’s documentary couldn’t have gotten closer to Spain’s greatest ever tennis player
